result: The R script has been successfully executed and the cleaned data file has been created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The file contains the NSID variable and the eight GHQ-12 variables (ghq15, ghq17, ghq25, ghq32, ghqtl15, ghqtl17, ghqtl25, ghqtl32) as requested, with all variables converted to factors. The script properly handled the missing value codes and derived the GHQ-12 sum scores according to the specified rules.
